evals.name: reckless-wookiee-buggy-impl
evals.prompt: Please review my implementation of Reckless Wookiee. Card text: When Played: Deal 1 damage to each unit in the ground arena. Implementation is at server/game/cards/08_ASH/units/RecklessWookiee.ts and test spec at test/server/cards/08_ASH/units/RecklessWookiee.spec.ts. The card JSON is in test/json/Card/reckless-wookiee.json.

assertions.text: Report identifies opponent.getArenaUnits() scopes to enemy-only
Blockers section has at least one item
Report has Pre-flight, Implementation, Test Spec, Card Text Accuracy sections

evals.name: wimpy-wampa-clean-impl
evals.prompt: Can you kareview my Wimpy Wampa card? Card text: When Played: Deal 2 damage to a unit. The files are at server/game/cards/08_ASH/units/WimpyWampa.ts and test/server/cards/08_ASH/units/WimpyWampa.spec.ts. Card JSON is in test/json/Card/wimpy-wampa.json.

assertions.text: Report includes jasmine test run command

evals.name: mortar-trooper-missing-spec
evals.prompt: kareview Mortar Trooper. Card text: On Attack: Deal 1 damage to an enemy unit. Implementation is at server/game/cards/08_ASH/units/MortarTrooper.ts. I have not written the test spec yet.

assertions.text: Pre-flight or Agent B flags missing spec as blocker
Report includes working TypeScript skeleton with describe/integration/beforeEach/it structure
Implementation tables populated despite no spec
